title: Iteration 1.3: CRM data + funnel + edge cases
description: Walk generated Db, insert companies/contacts/deals/tasks/contact_notes/deal_notes/tags with ID strip + FK remap in dependency order. Persist denormalized counts (nb_contacts, nb_deals, nb_tasks). Apply post-generation transforms: funnel-shape deal stages, reassign records to demo user, force edge cases (overdue task, stale deal, multi-email contact). Fixed faker seed for determinism. Verify UI shows funnel + populated lists + dashboard. See .devmeta/increments/increment-1-kpv/_overview.md.
